title: neolehmannia difformis
intro: Neolehmannia difformis, also known as the "water fern", is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Marsileaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Neolehmannia difformis can be made by drying and decocting the plant, and it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures.
